introSection: Gauntlet is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Magic Springs in Hot Springs, Arkansas, USA. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster installation from Vekoma and is the first to feature a redesigned wheel assembly designed to give a more comfortable ride.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was originally built for Jazzland (later Six Flags New Orleans), but the sale was never completed.

Gauntlet was announced on May 29, 2003. It opened on April 10, 2004.

fullText:
Gauntlet is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Magic Springs in Hot Springs, Arkansas, USA. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster installation from Vekoma and is the first to feature a redesigned wheel assembly designed to give a more comfortable ride.

The ride was originally built for Jazzland (later Six Flags New Orleans), but the sale was never completed.

Gauntlet was announced on May 29, 2003. It opened on April 10, 2004.
